title: fragaria chiloensis
intro: Fragaria chiloensis, also known as the beach strawberry or Chilean strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to the Pacific coast of the Americas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Fragaria chiloensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, making it a valuable addition to a healthy diet. Fragaria chiloensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other culinary preparations to harness its medicinal and nutritional properties.
